EXPLORE CURRENT LISTINGS

MEeT

Grace

Grace Guillen-Trevino specializes in representing Buyers and Sellers in the Houston, The Woodlands, Spring, Magnolia and surrounding areas. Her top priority is to provide all of her clients with unparalleled service and personal assistance with all of their real estate needs. Providing clients with the markets’ most accurate and updated information, her attention to detail, and ability to execute even the most complex transactions set her apart and always exceeds her clients expectations.

WHAT OUR CLIENTS

ARE SAYING

Grace was a wonderful realtor. She was there with me every step of the way and very patient with me and all the questions I had. I am a 1st time home buyer and I was very glad to have her there by my side explaining everything. Always kept up with updates and very informative. If your looking to buy Grace is your girl to be there and help every step of the way. Definitely deserves 10 stars instead of 5!
Barbra Davila
I want to take time out to say that I highly recommend Grace she answered every question I had. She told me the process I believe it went really smooth because of her. She check in even after the process. I will definitely be telling my friends and family about her. Thank you so much for my forever home⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐
Jessica Rodriguez
Grace did an exceptional job helping me find my home!! She definitely went above and beyond. Answered all my questions and always responded promptly. We would not hesitate to refer her to our friends and family!
Zo Lopez
Thanks to Grace our Realtor and Trey from Guild Mortgage , we moved into our First Home this past weekend . Hands down A Great Duo ! There was not a time or a day that both were not available for questions even on her vacation she managed to still be accessible. Her diligence for us as her clients was proven time and time again . Highly recommend the Duo that gets the job done . Thanks Again Grace and Trey for helping us accomplish our Dream ! purchase or sell a home
Racheal Deleon
Where do I even begin? Grace was our first and only choice for our first home. She went out of her way to find a new construction home for us when I personally gave up. She listened to what we wanted and we found that because of her. Grace will always answer her phone and is very communicated. I had my hiccups right before closing but grace kept my head up and made sure everything was in order . We made a new friend and a forever realtor, I highly recommend grace. She will never sugar coat anything and tell you how it is ave that’s what I needed to close on my first home. Can’t wait to move one day and use her again
Jeremy Rodirguez

Guillen Realty Group is a licensed real estate broker and abides by all applicable equal housing opportunity laws. All material presented herein is intended for informational purposes only. Information is compiled from sources deemed reliable but is subject to errors, omissions, changes in price, condition, sale, or withdrawal without notice. No statement is made as to accuracy of any description. All measurements and square footages are approximate. This is not intended to solicit property already listed. Nothing herein shall be construed as legal, accounting or other professional advice outside the realm of real estate brokerage.
